content.text: I'll read all four frames to judge continuity.
[Image: original 1280x3958, displayed at 647x2000. Multiply coordinates by 1.98 to map to original image.]

[{"ruleId":"V20","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"Probe is amber in video-02 (the horizontal needle at 'oppose/agree') and amber on page-01 (the large arrow labeled 'probe 90'). Candidate/list values are periwinkle blue in video-01 (the 0.90/0.80 columns), video-03 (light-blue 'you' bars), and page-01 (the c1-c4 arrows). Scores/params are lilac purple in video-01 (score 0.86), video-03 (fit score 76 and gauge), and page-01 (bars and '+94' plus the meter gauge). Labels are warm cream in every medium. All shared concepts wear the same token color across video and page.","suggestion":"None needed; probe=amber, candidates=periwinkle, scores/meter=lilac, labels=cream hold across both media."},{"ruleId":"V21","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"Every element across video-01/02/03 and page-01 sits within the Night School palette: deep navy bg, warm cream text, periwinkle-blue data, lilac-purple params/meter, amber probe, mint-green 'NIGHT SCHOOL' header on page-01. No saturated out-of-palette primary red/green/blue is present.","suggestion":"None."},{"ruleId":"V22","pass":true,"severity":"advisory","evidence":"Both media share the same deep-navy background, warm-cream serif/mono typographic temperature, and identical concept styling (arrows, bars, gauges). The page-01 embedded player and diagrams read as the same product family as video-01/02/03.","suggestion":"None."}]
